creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Neal Nelson from comment #0)

Hi Neal,

thank you for the report and the possible fix for it.  It seems that you still have devel/py-jsonschema 4.2.1 installed which has a missing dependency of devel/py-importlib-resources.

With devel/py-jsonschema 4.2.1_1 (via ports a07eecae140c) the issue should actually be fixed.
